$comment: Caitlin's shop, ordered as a wedding-day timeline. Order here is the order on shop.html. Editable in /admin.

categories.name: Getting Ready Prep
categories.tagline: The night before and the morning of
categories.blurb: Skin prep is the whole game. This is what I have my brides using in the run-up so the makeup sits right on the day.

categories.name: Lipstick
categories.tagline: The shades I reach for most
categories.blurb: Long-wear shades that survive the first look, the toasts, and the kiss.

categories.name: Lip Gloss
categories.blurb: Gloss reads beautifully on camera. These are the ones that don't go sticky.

categories.name: Powders
categories.blurb: The difference between makeup that lasts eight hours and makeup that lasts two.

categories.name: Blushes
categories.tagline: Colour that brings you back to life
categories.blurb: From a whisper of flush to a full romantic glow.

categories.name: End of the Night
categories.blurb: You will be tired. Your skin still deserves this.

categories.name: Tools
categories.blurb: The brushes, sponges and puffs I use on real clients — not the pretty ones that sit in a drawer.

categories.name: Accessories
categories.blurb: Bags, cases and clutches worth the counter space.

categories.name: Getting Ready Outfits
categories.blurb: Robes, pyjamas and personalised pieces for the photos you'll actually frame.
